# netbox_asn_range (Data Source)

Fetches an ASN range from NetBox by name or slug.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) The name of the ASN range to look up.
- `slug` (String) The slug of the ASN range to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the ASN range.
- `end` (Number) The ending ASN of the range.
- `id` (Number) The ID of the ASN range.
- `rir` (Number) The RIR ID associated with this ASN range.
- `start` (Number) The starting ASN of the range.
- `tenant` (Number) The tenant ID associated with this ASN range.
